artifacts.redacted_summary: Initial diagnosis indicated the integration was not universally failing to receive messages; at least one observed case was consistent with a group-chat trigger condition not being met. If users report that the bot is not replying, triage should separately verify whether the issue is trigger eligibility, a stuck conversation, or lack of model output. Operational checks should combine process status, gateway health, and recent dispatch activity rather than relying on a single command-line probe.
